content:
🚀 mcp-ssh-manager | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling AI models to securely and efficiently manage and automate tasks on remote SSH servers.
✨ Key Features: • Remote SSH server management via Model Context Protocol (MCP) • Compatibility with Claude Code and OpenAI Codex • Execute commands on remote servers • Transfer files to/from remote servers • Database operations
📖 Summary: MCP SSH Manager is a Node.js server that allows AI models like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex to manage remote SSH connections. It facilitates executing commands, transferring files, and automating DevOps tasks on multiple servers through the Model Context Protocol.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
